CustomField.description: URL link to the promo code (e.g., https://promo.atlassian.com/GWPGOA). This will be displayed as a clickable link in the UI.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: URL link to the promo code (e.g., https://promo.atlassian.com/GWPGOA). This will be displayed as a clickable link in the UI.
CustomField.label: Code URL
